Package net.sf.jasperreports.engine.xml

Class JacksonReportLoader

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jasperreports.engine.xml.JacksonReportLoader
All Implemented Interfaces:
net.sf.jasperreports.engine.xml.ReportLoader
public class JacksonReportLoader extends Object implements net.sf.jasperreports.engine.xml.ReportLoader
Report loader that inspects serialized JasperReports XML and dispatches to the Jackson-based loader when the root element matches a report or template type.
Author:
Lucian Chirita (lucianc@users.sourceforge.net)

  • Method Details

    • instance

      public static JacksonReportLoader instance()
      Returns the shared singleton instance.
      Returns:
      loader instance

    • loadReport

      public Optional<net.sf.jasperreports.engine.design.JasperDesign> loadReport(net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JasperReportsContext context, byte[] data) throws net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JRException
      Attempts to load a JasperDesign from the provided XML bytes when the root element indicates a Jasper report. The underlying Jackson loader handles the XML-to-object conversion.
      Specified by:
      loadReport in interface net.sf.jasperreports.engine.xml.ReportLoader
      Parameters:
      context - JasperReports context used for parsing
      data - serialized report XML content
      Returns:
      populated design when a report root element is detected; otherwise empty
      Throws:
      net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JRException - if the XML cannot be parsed into a Jasper design

    • detectReportXML

      protected boolean detectReportXML(byte[] data)
      Checks if the supplied XML represents a Jasper report.
      Parameters:
      data - serialized XML
      Returns:
      true when the root element is jasperReport

    • loadTemplate

      public Optional<net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JRTemplate> loadTemplate(net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JasperReportsContext context, byte[] data)
      Attempts to load a JRTemplate when the XML payload represents a template root element.
      Specified by:
      loadTemplate in interface net.sf.jasperreports.engine.xml.ReportLoader
      Parameters:
      context - JasperReports context used for parsing
      data - serialized template XML content
      Returns:
      populated template when a template root is detected; otherwise empty

    • detectRootElement

      protected boolean detectRootElement(byte[] data, String elementName)
      Streams the XML bytes and inspects the first start element to see if it matches the provided element name. The reader is namespace aware but only checks the local name to keep compatibility with different namespace declarations.
      Parameters:
      data - serialized XML to inspect
      elementName - expected root element local name
      Returns:
      true when the first start element matches
